ddls:
CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of the move (e.g., Psychic, Poison) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the move (e.g., Status, Special) */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the move (if applicable) */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy percentage of the move */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* PP (Power Points) of the move */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move */,
  "effect_chance" INTEGER /* Chance of additional effects occurring */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of additional effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Psychic, Fire) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Status, Special) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_learn_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the learning method (e.g., Level Up, TM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type1" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon */,
  "base_hp" INTEGER /* Base HP of the Pokémon */,
  "base_attack" INTEGER /* Base Attack of the Pokémon */,
  "base_defense" INTEGER /* Base Defense of the Pokémon */,
  "base_special_attack" INTEGER /* Base Special Attack of the Pokémon */,
  "base_special_defense" INTEGER /* Base Special Defense of the Pokémon */,
  "base_speed" INTEGER /* Base Speed of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon learning the move */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being learned */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method by which the move is learned */,
  "level_learned" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon learns the move (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id", "move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES move_learn_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon using the move */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being used */,
  "turn_number" INTEGER /* Turn number during which the move was used */,
  "battle_result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., win, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id", "pokemon_id", "turn_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness entry */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of the move */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target */,
  "effectiveness" INTEGER /* Effectiveness of the move against the target type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_effectiveness_move_type FOREIGN KEY ("move_type") REFERENCES move_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_histories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_histories_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle outcome */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning Pokémon */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_outcomes_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_outcomes_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_outcomes_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move usage */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being used */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "turn_number" INTEGER /* Turn number during which the move was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_usage_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_usage_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the stat (e.g., HP, Attack) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the stat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_stats_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_types" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id", "type_id")
)
